name: Woven Bread Basket Natural - Threshold™
description:
Store your homemade goodies stylishly while keeping them easily accessible with this Woven Bread Basket from Threshold™. Made of water hyacinth material in a natural hue, this round bread basket features a woven design for charming appeal. The open top lets you easily store and access a variety of items, while the lightweight design makes it easy to move around your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
